---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in the engine or app
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Summary

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

A failing unit test against `LocalMindKitCore` is the most useful repro.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include error text / stack trace if any).

## Environment

- Component: [core engine / iOS app]
- OS / device: [e.g. iOS 26.5, iPhone 16 simulator, macOS 26.5]
- Swift / Xcode version:
- Commit / branch:

## Additional context

Anything else that helps — screenshots, sample input, etc. Please do **not**
attach private images or PDFs; describe the content instead.
